description: ClawGuard scan suppressions for known false positives in upstream code. Each entry must include a justification explaining why the finding is safe.

suppressions.justification: shell:true only for Windows .cmd/.bat files. Args passed as array (no injection vector). Command comes from config, not user input. Required for Windows batch execution.
\u0000 null byte used as composite key delimiter for message deduplication caches. Standard pattern to prevent key collisions (e.g. separating accountId from historyId). No obfuscation intent.
